idMal.description: The mal id of the media

title.description: The official titles of the media in various languages

type.description: The type of the media; anime or manga

format.description: The format the media was released in

status.description: The current releasing status of the media

description.description: Short description of the media's story and characters

startDate.description: The first official release date of the media

endDate.description: The last official release date of the media

season.description: The season the media was initially released in

seasonYear.description: The season year the media was initially released in

seasonInt.description: The year & season the media was initially released in

episodes.description: The amount of episodes the anime has when complete

duration.description: The general length of each anime episode in minutes

chapters.description: The amount of chapters the manga has when complete

volumes.description: The amount of volumes the manga has when complete

countryOfOrigin.description: Where the media was created. (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)

isLicensed.description: If the media is officially licensed or a self-published doujin release

source.description: Source type the media was adapted from.

hashtag.description: Official Twitter hashtags for the media

updatedAt.description: When the media's data was last updated

coverImage.description: The cover images of the media

bannerImage.description: The banner image of the media

averageScore.description: A weighted average score of all the user's scores of the media

meanScore.description: Mean score of all the user's scores of the media

popularity.description: The number of users with the media on their list

isLocked.description: Locked media may not be added to lists our favorited. This may be due to the entry pending for deletion or other reasons.

trending.description: The amount of related activity in the past hour

favourites.description: The amount of user's who have favourited the media

tags.description: List of tags that describes elements and themes of the media

relations.description: Other media in the same or connecting franchise

staff.description: The staff who produced the media

studios.description: The companies who produced the media

isFavourite.description: If the media is marked as favourite by the current authenticated user

isFavouriteBlocked.description: If the media is blocked from being added to favourites

isAdult.description: If the media is intended only for 18+ adult audiences

nextAiringEpisode.description: The media's next episode airing schedule

externalLinks.description: External links to another site related to the media

streamingEpisodes.description: Data and links to legal streaming episodes on external sites

rankings.description: The ranking of the media in a particular time span and format compared to other media

mediaListEntry.description: The authenticated user's media list entry for the media

siteUrl.description: The url for the media page on the AniList website

autoCreateForumThread.description: If the media should have forum thread automatically created for it on airing episode release

isRecommendationBlocked.description: If the media is blocked from being recommended to/from

isReviewBlocked.description: If the media is blocked from being reviewed
